explanations: Mesh joined to distinct-role support members: assembly type WDK.
Front edge WATERFALL recorded as configuration (CFG:EDG) — variation lives in fields, not codes (rule P5).
Product family (FAM) level is outside Phase 1 scope; the path enters at the assembly/role level (rule H3: entry at any level is valid).

components.note: support channels; the mesh panel role (MSH in SNAP-1.0.0) is outside the Phase 1 role subset

designation: WDK EDG.front=WATERFALL SUP.count=3 (dimensions not captured in Phase 1)

db_mapping.note: Registered identifiers are issued by the SMHE registry, never by this tool.
